headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 16, 2026**
article:
The Washington Nationals secured a thrilling 8-7 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Marcell Ozuna leading the offense. In other action, the San Francisco Giants shut out the Cincinnati Reds 3-0, while the Los Angeles Angels dominated the New York Yankees 11-4.

Injuries continue to plague several teams, with the Washington Nationals transferring left-hander Ken Waldichuk to the 60-day injured list due to left forearm tightness. The Texas Rangers have placed several players on the injured list, including Chris Martin, Luis Curvelo, and Cody Bradford. The New York Mets have also placed Jared Young on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 13, 2026, due to a left meniscus tear.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place, including the Baltimore Orioles acquiring right-handed pitcher Axel Perez from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott. The Washington Nationals have also acquired left-hander Richard Lovelady from the New York Mets for cash.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Pirates in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a hard-fought 8-7 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Marcell Ozuna leading the offense with a home run and three RBIs. Clayton Beeter earned the win, while Orlando Ribalta secured the save.

top_news.title: **Giants Shut Out Reds 3-0**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a shutout victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with Landen Roupp pitching 6.0 innings of scoreless baseball. Jung Hoo Lee led the Giants' offense with 3 hits and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall Short in Thrilling 9-10 Loss to Tigers**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Kansas City Royals 9-10 in a closely contested game. Salvador Perez led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Angels Soar Past Yankees 11-4**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dominated the New York Yankees in a lopsided 11-4 victory. Jo Adell led the Angels' offense with a grand slam and 4 RBIs, while Sam Bachman pitched 3 strong innings in relief.

top_news.title: **Nationals' Waldichuk Shifted to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Washington Nationals left-hander Ken Waldichuk has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to left forearm tightness.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Axel Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired right-handed pitcher Axel Perez in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Perez joins the Orioles after being dealt for right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott.
